join.warning: Symbols/tickers are NOT unique. Ticker-squatting is common in this market — the same symbol is deployed by multiple unrelated wallets. NEVER join on symbol.
join.join_on: id (virtuals_id) or wallet (creator_wallet). pre_token/token_address are null for retrospective entries — the backtest source did not preserve the contract address.

coverage.universe: Virtuals Protocol 'Unicorn' launchpad (BONDING_V5 factory) on Base only.
coverage.absence_meaning: A launch absent from VIRGIL's data pre-dates coverage or was launched outside this universe (a different launchpad, or an earlier Virtuals mechanism). Absence is NOT a red flag.

note: Launches from before VIRGIL began live coverage, graded retrospectively by the same rubric, as-of-launch. Not issued in real time.
